title: War
tmdbOverview: Khalid, entrusted with the task of eliminating former soldier turned rogue Kabir, engages in an epic battle with his mentor who taught him everything.
synopsis: War is a 2019 action, thriller and adventure film from India. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a MA 15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
